title: Compliance: oscore/oscore.c OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c. Status: COMPLIANT. Full RFC 8613 implementation with AES-CCM-16-64-128, HKDF-SHA256, replay protection, and proper nonce computation. OSCORE context creation, protect_request, unprotect_request, protect_response, unprotect_response all implemented.
close_reason: Verified compliant: Full RFC 8613 implementation with AES-CCM-16-64-128, HKDF-SHA256, two-phase replay protection (reserve before decrypt, commit after auth), nonce reuse prevention via mandatory sender_seq initialization, constant-time ID comparison, proper key material wiping via crypto_wipe(). Complies with 06-security.md Section 8.7 and appendix-c-safety.md.
